name: closing-set
content:
// DJ OPUS - CLOSING SET
// Last track of the night. Stars overhead.
setcps(118/60/4)

let depth = slider(0.4, 0, 0.7, 0.01, "DEPTH")
let fade = slider(0.5, 0, 1, 0.01, "FADE")

// No kick. Just the wash.
let sub = note("<a1 e1>".slow(8))
  .s("sine")
  .gain(0.3)
  .decay(2)
  .sustain(0.2)

// Pad - barely there, breathing
let pad = note("<[a2,e3] [e2,b2]>".slow(8))
  .s("sawtooth")
  .cutoff(perlin.range(200, 900).slow(32))
  .resonance(3)
  .attack(3)
  .decay(4)
  .sustain(0.4)
  .release(4)
  .gain(depth)
  .room(0.95)
  .size(0.98)

// Voice texture - slow vowel drift
let voice = note("<a3 e3>".slow(8))
  .s("sawtooth")
  .vowel("<a o u>".slow(16))
  .cutoff(perlin.range(300, 1000).slow(32))
  .resonance(5)
  .attack(2)
  .decay(3)
  .sustain(0.3)
  .release(3)
  .gain(depth)
  .room(0.95)
  .size(0.98)

// One note. Long delay. Fading.
let note1 = note("~ ~ ~ a4 ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~".slow(4))
  .s("triangle")
  .cutoff(1200)
  .decay(1.5)
  .sustain(0)
  .gain(fade)
  .delay(0.6)
  .delaytime(1)
  .delayfeedback(0.6)
  .room(0.9)

stack(sub, pad, voice, note1)
